headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma secures $320M contract with a national infrastructure agency

sentiment.reasoning: Organizational restructuring creates significant near-term operational disruption and uncertainty regarding future efficiency.

headlines.headline: Creven Securities reports 8% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% decline in operating income is a direct negative indicator of financial performance that will likely weigh on sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
